assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 9: '**Checkout the feature branch**: `git checkout TC-9005` -- The task's Target Branch is `TC-9005` (a feature branch, not `main`), so we must first check out this branch as the base.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 14: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"' and line 69: 'The PR targets `--base TC-9005` (the feature branch), NOT `main`, because the task's Target Branch is `TC-9005`.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 10: '**Create task branch**: `git checkout -b TC-9205` -- Create the task branch from TC-9005, named after the Jira task issue ID per convention.' and line 13: 'git push -u origin TC-9205'. Task branch TC-9205 is distinct from Target Branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 19-24 lists all three files for pre-implementation inspection: '1. **`entity/src/advisory.rs`**', '2. **`migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs`**', '3. **`migration/src/lib.rs`**'. Additionally file-1-description.md and file-2-description.md each have 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' sections referencing these files.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 44-51 show commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat', scope 'migration', description) and footer 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 9: 'The task's Target Branch is `TC-9005` (a feature branch, not `main`)'. Line 69: 'The PR targets `--base TC-9005` (the feature branch), NOT `main`, because the task's Target Branch is `TC-9005`.' conventions.md line 22: 'Feature branch targeting: When a task has a Target Branch that is not `main`, the task branch is created from that feature branch and the PR targets it with `--base`.'
